content.text:
<user_query>
You are extracting ONLY real phrases from source files. Read ALL markdown files in these two directories:

1. `c:\Users\016551\OneDrive\Desktop\流程建设\统一表述知识库\Meet&Spec md文件` (all subdirectories)
2. `c:\Users\016551\OneDrive\Desktop\流程建设\统一表述知识库\POP md文件`

## Task A: Hardware/Component Terms
Search for all physical hardware component names that appear in the source files. Use Grep to search for these patterns (case insensitive):
- button, microphone, mic, speaker, transducer, driver, cable, charger, charging, case, adapter, cushion, ear hook, headband, frame, titanium, silicone, LED, indicator, port, USB, mesh, membrane, diaphragm, compartment, JointArc, nozzle, sensor, lens

For each hardware term found, record:
- The EXACT English phrase as it appears
- The EXACT French phrase if found in a French file for the same product
- The EXACT Chinese phrase if found in POP files
- Which file(s) it appears in

## Task B: Action/Instruction Phrases  
Search for all action/instruction sentences. Use Grep to find sentences containing these verb patterns (case insensitive):
- "press", "hold", "tap", "pinch", "pair", "connect", "switch", "play", "pause", "mute", "unmute", "adjust", "skip", "activate", "download", "customize", "customise", "choose", "create", "place", "clip", "charge", "plug", "organize", "build", "turn on", "turn off", "open.*case", "wear", "remove"

And French verbs:
- "appuyez", "maintenez", "tapotez", "pincez", "appairez", "connectez", "passez", "lire", "pause", "coupez", "réactivez", "ajustez", "activez", "téléchargez", "personnalisez", "choisissez", "créez", "placez", "clipsez", "branchez", "organisez"

For each action phrase found, record:
- The EXACT sentence as it appears (keep it complete, don't truncate)
- Which file it comes from
- The corresponding translation if available in a paired EN/FR file

Return TWO complete lists:
1. HARDWARE_TERMS: all unique hardware/component terms with EN, ZH, FR where available, and source files
2. ACTION_PHRASES: all unique action/instruction sentences with EN, FR where available, and source files

Be extremely thorough. This will be used to build a translation memory database. Every entry must be traceable to a specific source file.
</user_query>

正在全面搜索这两个目录下的 Markdown 文件，先列出所有 `.md` 文件并并行检索硬件词与动作动词模式。

[REDACTED]

继续检索未完整覆盖的 Meet&Spec 子目录，并运行动作动词检索。

[REDACTED]

继续补全被截断的检索：针对动作句与遗漏的硬件词进行定向搜索。

[REDACTED]

以下为对 **40 个** `Meet&Spec md文件` 下 Markdown 与 **25 个** `POP md文件` 下 Markdown 的只读检索汇总。说明：

- 根路径：`c:\Users\016551\OneDrive\Desktop\流程建设\统一表述知识库\`
- 部分 Meet文档存在 **OCR/断行/乱码**（如 OpenSwim Pro 英法 MEET、OpenRun Pro 2 MEET），下文 **按文件中原样** 摘录。
- 模式 **`sensor`**：仅 **OpenFit Pro** 出现硬件含义的 *sensor system*；**OpenComm** 类文件中的 *sensory awareness* 不是传感器，**未**列入硬件词。
- 模式 **`nozzle`**：两目录 **未**命中硬件用法。
- **`case`**：为避免匹配 *in case* 等，检索使用了词边界；营销句里的 *charging case*、*carrying case* 等均已覆盖。

---

## 1. HARDWARE_TERMS（硬件/部件相关表述）

下列每条为 **在源文件中出现的、与所给硬件关键词相关的典型英文短语/规格用语**（及同产品法语/POP 中文，若同一语义在对应文件中出现）。**ZH仅来自 POP 表格**（简体/繁体混排按原文）。**来源文件** 使用相对路径（相对 `统一表述知识库`）。

## 2. ACTION_PHRASES（动作/说明句）

以下均为 **命中所给动词模式** 的 **完整源行**（部分英语文件因排版被拆成两行，在「备注」中合并说明）。**FR** 为同产品法语文件中可对齐的句段。**POP** 多为表格单元格短句，仍保留原文。

### 2.1 OpenSwim Pro

| EN（完整句，原文行） | FR（完整句，原文行） | 来源 |
|----------------------|----------------------|------|
| You can easily **organize** your tracks and **build** custom playlists for every session. | Organisez vos morceaux et **créez** des listes de lecture personnalisées pour chaque séance. | `Meet&Spec md文件\OpenSwim Pro\[English]OPENSWIM PRO_MEET.md` / `[French] OPENSWIM PRO_MEET.md` |
| **Pair** OpenSwim Pro with two Bluetooth devices simultaneously, including smartwatches, smartphones, tablets, and more. **Switch** effortlessly via the Shokz App or button controls for versatile listening. | **Appairez** OpenSwim Pro simultanément avec deux appareils Bluetooth, comme des montres intelligentes, smartphones, tablettes, etc. **Passez** de l'un a l'autre sans effort via l'application Shokz ou les commandes boutons | 同上 |
| **Wear** headphones properly and **adjust** volume to be aware of your surroundings, especially traffic, during outdoor workouts. | **Portez** le casque correctement et **ajustez** le volume pour rester conscient de votre environnement, notamment de la circulation, pendant les entrainements en extérieur. | 同上 |
| A quick 10-minute **charge** gives you **3 hours** of listening time. | Une **charge** rapide de **10 minutes** vous offre jusqu’a **3 heures** d’écoute. | 同上 |

### 2.2 OpenDots ONE

| EN | FR | 来源 |
|----|----|------|
| Simply **clip** them on and immerse yourself in your favorite sounds, wherever life takes you. | **Clipsez-les** simplement et plongez dans vos sons préférés, où que la vie vous mène. | `OpenDotsOne Spec Sheet  四色_US.md` / `OpenDotsOne Spec Sheet 四色_FR.md` |
| Simply **clip** them on and immerse yourself in your favorite sounds, wherever life takes you. | （同义）**Clipsez-les** simplement… | `OpenDotsOne MEET_US(四色).md` / `OpenDotsOne MEET_FR(四色).md` |
| **Customize** Your Sound. | **Personnalisez** votre son. | MEET US/FR |
| Standard, Vocal, Bass and Private Mode - or **create** your own custom profile. | Standard, Vocal, Bass et Mode Privé - ou **créez** votre propre profil. | MEET US/FR |
| **Simply clip** them on and **hit play**. When you're done, **place** the earbuds in either **port** of the charging case – no need to worry about which side is which. | **Clipsez-les** et **appuyez** sur lecture. Pour les ranger, **placez-les** simplement dans le boîtier de charge, sans vous soucier de leur orientation. | MEET US/FR |
| **Tap** the battery compartment or JointArc, or '**pinch**' the battery compartment with two fingers to control your music and calls with ease. | **Tapotez** le compartiment batterie ou JointArc, ou « **pincez** » le compartiment batterie avec deux doigts pour contrôler facilement votre musique et appel. | MEET US/FR |
| **Connect** to two devices simultaneously thanks to MultiPoint **Pairing**, and **switch** between them effortlessly with the Shokz App. | Grâce à la technologie Appairage MultiPoint, **connectez** vos écouteurs à deux appareils simultanément et échangez entre eux en toute simplicité via l'application Shokz. | MEET US（第68–69行）/ FR（第69–70行，排版分段） |
| **Customize** the touch controls to fit your lifestyle. **Skip** tracks, **pause** or **play** music, **adjust** volume, and **activate** your voice assistant with a simple **tap**. | **Configurez** les contrôles tactiles selon vos habitudes : passer des titres, mettre en **pause**/**lire**, **ajuster** le volume ou **activer** votre assistant vocal d'un simple geste. | MEET US/FR |
| **Activate** Dolby Audio in the Shokz App for an immersive listening experience. | **Activez** le Dolby Audio via l'App Shokz pour une expérience d’écoute immersive. | MEET US/FR |
| Les données de charge rapide… si vous **placez** les écouteurs dans le boîtier de charge pendant **10 minutes**, vous pouvez **lire** l'audio… | （法文脚注，含 **placez** / **lire**） | `OpenDotsOne MEET_FR(四色).md` |

### 2.3 OpenFit| EN | FR | 来源 |
|----|----|------|
| Audio playback and calls can be controlled directly on the built-in touchpads, truly freeing your hands without additional phone operation. The touchpads take double-**tap** and **press**-and-**hold** controls and more **customized** control through the Shokz app. | — | `OpenFit\OpenFit Meet US.md` |
| **Open** and **connect**! BluetoothTM 5.2 provides a **10m** wireless range for an immediate, stable **connection**. | — | 同上 |
| Use the Shokz App to **customize** your own listening experience. **Download** the app to **personalize** your favorite EQ modes and button functions… | — | 同上 |
| OpenFit must have completed the first **pairing** **connection** with the **chosen** device and ensure that Bluetooth **pairing** is **turned** on for the **connected** device. | — | 同上（脚注） |
| please ensure earbuds are being properly **worn** and control the volume… | — | 同上 |

### 2.4 OpenFit Pro

| EN | FR | 来源 |
|----|----|------|
| **Choose** from 5 preset EQ modes or **create** 2 customisable 10-band profiles… **Enable** Noise Reduction Mode… | **Choisissez** parmi 5 modes EQ prédéfinis ou **créez** 2 profils personnalisables… **Activez** le Mode Réduction de Bruit… | `OpenFit Pro` EN/FR MEET |
| Our intelligent noise reduction algorithm automatically **adjusts** in real time… You can also fine-**tune**… | Notre algorithme intelligent de réduction de bruit s'**ajuste** automatiquement… Vous pouvez aussi **régler** manuellement… | 同上（**adjust** 为指令相关描述句） |
| **Waterproof** physical buttons… minimises accidental **presses**… | …minimise les **pressions** accidentelles… | 同上 |
| automatically **playing** music when **worn** and **pausing** instantly when **removed**. | …**lecture** automatique lors de la mise en place et **pause** immédiate au retrait. | 同上 |
| The **case opens** to instant **pairing**, so your audio is ready when you are. | Le boîtier permet l'**appairage** instantané dès l'**ouverture**, pour un audio toujours prêt quand vous l'êtes. | 同上 |

### 检索覆盖说明

- **HARDWARE**：凡命中 `button|microphone|…|lens` 模式的行均已在上面按主题归纳；各 Spec 表中大量重复的 `Microphone sensitivity` / `Speaker type` / `Charging voltage` 等 **规格行** 未逐行重复列出，但均分布于对应产品的 `Meet&Spec md文件\…\*.md` 中。
- **ACTION**：凡命中英/法动词模式的 **完整源行** 已列出；少数 **跨行英文**（OpenDots `Connect…`、OpenComm2 2025 `press a button…`）在表中已说明。

若你需要 **机器可导入的 TSV**（每条一行、列：EN, FR, ZH, path），可切换到 Agent 模式由我根据同一批文件导出。
